case_title: AMERICAN SAVINGS BANK, F.A. vs. SANCHEZ, OSCAR I. et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN SAVINGS BANK, F.A. COURT TRIAL SET FOR AUG-15-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, OSCAR I. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 115 VALMAR TERRACE SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94112, STAYED UNTIL SEP-10-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY; PHYSICAL EVICTION STAYED TO 9/10/96. DEFT. AGREES THAT A NOTICE OF SET EVICTION MAY BE POSTED 9/10/96 ONE DAY PRIOR TO LOCKOUT ON 9/11/96. NO FURTHER STAYS.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, OSCAR I.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, OSCAR I.
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED; JURY TRIAL SET; NOTICE MAILED FILED BY DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, OSCAR I. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-14-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR, CASE SETTLED AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $0.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN SAVINGS BANK, F.A.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, OSCAR I.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN SAVINGS BANK, F.A. AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, OSCAR I. DAVIS, BONNIE J. DOES I THROUGH X INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN SAVINGS BANK, F.A. AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, BONNIE J.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT SERVED JUL-13-1996, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, BONNIE J.

C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. MONICA BAUM, PRO TEM JUDGE. JOANNE PRIOR, REPORTER. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT, EXCEPT PLAINTIFF WHO WAS ON TELEPHONE STANDBY. DEFAULT OF DEFT. BONNIE J. DAVIS ENTERED ON 8/6/96. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF FOR RESTITUTION OF THE SUBJECT PROPERTY. WRIT MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH; STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION THROUGH 9/10/96. DEFT. WAIVES FIVE DAY NOTICE OF EVICTION IN CONSIDERATION FOR PLAINTIFF'S PROMISE TO POST THE WRIT ON 9/10/96 ONLY IF THE DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO VACATE THE PROPERTY HEREIN DESCRIBED.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
